1559		loopLogPath := filepath.Join(loopLogDir, loopSessionID+".jsonl")

1589		if loopSink != nil {

1598		defer localCoord.Stop()
1599	
1600		// Build post-merge reviewer unless --no-review is set.
1601		// Reviewer is on-by-default: runs at smart tier after every successful merge.
1602		var reviewer agent.BeadReviewer
1603		if !noReview {
1604			reviewer = &agent.DefaultBeadReviewer{
1605				ProjectRoot: projectRoot,
1606				BeadStore:   bead.NewStore(filepath.Join(projectRoot, ".ddx")),
1607				BeadEvents:  bead.NewStore(filepath.Join(projectRoot, ".ddx")),
1608				Harness:     reviewHarness,
1609				Model:       reviewModel,
1610			}
1611		}
1612	
1613		profile = agent.NormalizeRoutingProfile(profile)
1614	
1615		// SD-024 Stage 1: dispatch flows through LoadAndResolve + RunWithConfig
1616		// so .ddx/config.yaml's durable knobs (review_max_retries,
1617		// no_progress_cooldown, max_no_changes_before_close, heartbeat_interval,
1618		// agent.model/permissions, etc.) reach the running loop without
1619		// per-knob CLI plumbing. CLI flag values feed CLIOverrides which win

1633		rcfg, err := config.LoadAndResolve(projectRoot, overrides)
1634		if err != nil {
1635			// Surface the LoadAndResolve error rather than letting a
